title: Smoky Padron Pepper Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry dish featuring smoky and padron peppers in a savory french-inspired sauce.

ingredients.name: Optional: chili flakes or red pepper flakes

instructions: Heat the French olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced smoky peppers and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until slightly tender.
Add the sliced padron peppers and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the peppers are tender.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Season the peppers and garlic with salt and black pepper to taste.
If desired, add chili flakes or red pepper flakes for extra heat.
Serve the peppers and garlic hot, with French bread on the side if desired.
